title: Gesneria calycosa
intro: Gesneria calycosa, also known as the Calycosa plant, is a species of flowering plant in the Gesneriaceae family, native to Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its potential health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Bioactive constituents of Gesneria calycosa include alkaloids, flavonoids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made from the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat fever, inflammation, and other health conditions.
